basicInfo.name: Nightmare Ling Ling
basicInfo.flavor: Ling Ling eventually was able to purify her body of impure energy, retaining only pure, clean energy. Her master praised her, saying she had achieved true pure, refined energy.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Ki Orb
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 300% of Physical Attack 7 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 300% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Raging Dragon
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Physical Attack 5 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 1000% of the caster's Physical Attack. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Ki Absorption
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Revives with 100% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]

profile.story:
Ling Ling had been frail since a child, and when the War of Destruction began, obtaining medicine became increasingly difficult.
One day, a martial artist who had gone several days without food collapsed in front of Ling Ling's home.
Despite their limited means, Ling Ling's parents shared their food with the stranger.
After seeing Ling Ling's condition, the martial artist explained that her illness was not ordinary. It was caused by an overly strong flow of internal energy.
Following this realization, Ling Ling began learning qigong, and thanks to her training, she quickly regained her health.
Later, she helped her parents run their tavern, and over time, she became so strong that she could easily handle rowdy drunken patrons with a single hand.
